title: hieracium sparsum subsp. macedonicum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. macedonicum, also known as Macedonian hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. macedonicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts are used in herbal medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its therapeutic properties.
